section: ARECO Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per column, attribute labels down the left. Selections are black-filled cells. Three asset columns; the EIF row is blank for all three data columns (individual stocks, not EIFs). The Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three columns (no letter visible); all three carry real value buckets, confirming the band is a divider.

uncertainties.read: Transaction row is a continuous black band across all three asset columns, no letter visible
uncertainties.note: black band spans every asset column uniformly with no P/S/E legible; all three carry real value buckets, so the band is a formatting divider; recorded null for all three
